zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Avice Bellers於1318年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾巴斯福德時，她的父親Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny48歲，母親Alice de Wakebridge45歲。她於1335年與Sir Ralph Cromwell在英國諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年4月21日之後在英國越可爾多卡斯特，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Avice Bellers于1318年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾巴斯福德时，她的父亲Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny48岁，母亲Alice de Wakebridge45岁。她于1335年与Sir Ralph Cromwell在英国諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年4月21日之后在英国越可爾多卡斯特，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bellers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bellairs
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bellars , suggesting French belle(s) aire(s) ‘lovely demeanor’.

variants.name: Bellars
meanings: (of Norman origin): apparently from Old French bélier ‘ram’, hence a nickname for someone thought to resemble a ram in some way or possibly a metonymic occupational name for a shepherd. In Northamptonshire the name attracts excrescent -s already by 1377.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Avice Bellers was born in 1318, in Basford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny, was 48 and her mother, Alice de Wakebridge, was 45. She married Sir Ralph Cromwell in 1335, in Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 21 April 1367, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Avice Bellers est née en 1318, à Basford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice de Wakebridge, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Cromwell en 1335, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 21 avril 1367, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Avice Bellers 1318 in Basford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny 48 und ihre Mutter Alice de Wakebridge 45. Sie hat 1335 in Nottinghamshire, England Sir Ralph Cromwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 21. April 1367 in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Avice Bellers è nata il nel 1318 nel Basford, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Alice de Wakebridge, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Cromwell nel 1335, nel Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 21 aprile 1367, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Avice Bellersが1318年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアバスフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunnyは48歳，母Alice de Wakebridgeは45歳であった。1335年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでSir Ralph Cromwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年4月21日以後にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Avice Bellers(이)가 1318년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 바스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Wakebridge(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 1335년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 Sir Ralph Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 4월 21일 이후 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Avice Bellers nasceu em 1318, em Basford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Wakebridge, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Cromwell em 1335, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 21 de abril de 1367, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Avice Bellers родилась в 1318 г. в местности басфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Wakebridge, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Cromwell в 1335 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 21 апрель 1367 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Avice Bellers nació en 1318, en Basford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger De Bellers Of Bunny, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice de Wakebridge, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph Cromwell en 1335, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 21 de abril de 1367, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
